Name: [E2E] Rebuild Book Only and Handle Outdated AI Content State for Smart Summary and Smart Prep
Precondition: User has valid System Admin credentials. Application is accessible at https://mod-lab-auto.boardeffect.diligentoneplatform-dev.com. UI-Workroom workroom (id: 5732) exists with Library access enabled. A PDF test file is available for upload as book content.
Objective: To verify that after creating a meeting book, generating and publishing AI content (Smart Summary and Smart Prep) via the GovernAI panel, and performing a 'Rebuild book only', the system correctly marks AI content as outdated. The GovernAI panel must show an 'AI content is outdated.' warning, both Smart Summary and Smart Prep must show 'Review & publish' options, and the 'Regenerate AI content' button must be visible in the footer.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: none | value: https://mod-lab-auto.boardeffect.diligentoneplatform-dev.com
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: OIDC login page loads. 'Sign in to Diligent One Platform' heading is visible. Email and Password input fields and 'Sign in' button are present.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter the System Admin email in the Email field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=textbox name="Email" | value: mshinde+uisa1@diligent.com
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated in the Email field.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter the password in the Password field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=textbox name="Password" | value: UIAutomation@1234
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Password is entered and displayed as masked characters.

XX%' text is shown for first-time builds. Footer shows 'Close' and 'Attach or create event' buttons.

A transient toast notification 'The AI content is outdated' with a yellow/warning indicator may appear briefly with 'Dismiss' and 'Regenerate summary' buttons before auto-dismissing.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click the 'GovernAI' button to open the panel and verify the outdated AI state
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: data-testid="library-button-governai" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: GovernAI panel opens. A warning note/alert is visible at the top of the panel body containing the text 'AI content is outdated.'

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the full outdated state in the GovernAI panel
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=dialog [active] | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: All of the following are visible: (1) 'AI content is outdated.' warning note at the top. (2) 'Generated on: {date}' and 'Last contributor: {email}' metadata. (3) Smart Summary item showing status 'Not visible' and a 'Review & publish' button. (4) Smart Prep item showing status 'Not visible' and a 'Review & publish' button. (5) 'Regenerate AI content' button in the footer.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Review & publish' for Smart Summary and verify the sub-view in outdated state
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Review & publish" (first instance, Smart Summary row) | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Smart Summary sub-view opens. Heading shows 'Smart Summary - {Book Title}' (h2). 'Go back' button is visible. AI content (Executive Summary and Detailed Summary sections) is displayed with 'Generated by AI' label. Footer shows 'Edit', 'Download', and 'Publish' buttons. Publish is ENABLED because 'Visible to workroom' remains ON from step 14. If visibility had been turned off, Publish would be disabled and alert 'You can only publish the Smart Summary after you make the book visible.' would appear.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Go back' and then click 'Review & publish' for Smart Prep to verify its outdated sub-view
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Go back" | value: none (then) locator: role=button name="Review & publish" (Smart Prep row) | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: GovernAI main panel returns showing both items with 'Review & publish' buttons. Smart Prep sub-view opens. Heading shows 'Smart Prep - {Book Title}' (h2). AI-generated prep content is displayed with 'Generated by AI' label. Footer shows 'Edit', 'Download', and 'Publish' buttons. Publish is ENABLED because 'Visible to workroom' remains ON from step 14.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Close the GovernAI panel to complete the test
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Close governAI panel" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: GovernAI panel closes. Book details page is fully visible. The 'Rebuild Book Only' and outdated AI content state flow has been verified end-to-end: smart content is retained after rebuild but correctly flagged as outdated with appropriate regeneration options.
